experiments.title: Test modestly larger winner sizing
experiments.hypothesis: If hit rate remains decent but relative returns lag SPY, modestly larger effective sizing in the highest-score names may improve returns without materially worsening drawdown.
experiments.proposedChange: Test slightly larger starter positions or faster scaling for top-score names; do not change live rules until the test design is locked.
experiments.metric: Improve 4-week relative return vs SPY while keeping max drawdown from worsening by more than 1 percentage point versus current baseline.
experiments.risk: Larger sizing can amplify weak signals and raise concentration risk.
